titleStmt.title: SII 11.92: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 92. (B.K. No. 47 of 1927-28). TĀṀBRAGUṆḌI, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE ĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I) and records a grant of gold made to the temples of Kalidēvasvāmin and Vishṇudēva for lamps, offerings etc., by Dāsimayya while he was administering the agrahāra Kisuguṇḍi (modern TāMbraguṇḍi) as a subordinate of Mahāsāmanta Mādhavārarasa of the Yādava family. The gift was made in the presence of the Fifty Mahājanas of the agrahāra and entrusted to their care.
The record is dated Śaka 976, Jaya, Bādubbe-amāvāsye, solar eclipse = A.D. 1054, May 10, Tuesday. There was a solar eclipse on this day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛtvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśva
ra paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatrai
ḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁ saluttamire . samadhigatapañcamahāśabdamahāsāmantaṁ . vija
yalakṣmīkāntaṁ . dvārāvatīpuravarēśvaraṁ . yādavavamśōdbavaṁ . yuvatija
nacittōdbhavaṁ . suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ . visadekīrttidhvajaṁ . raṇamūrkkhapārtthaṁ . paraba
ḷadhūrttaṁ . kṛtayugacarita . nāḷgenallātaṁ . gōtrapavitra . nahitanikṣatraṁ .
taḍevilladīvaṁ . maṟevugekāvaṁ . yuddhadhurandharaṁ . dhairyyadharādharaṁ . vīra
śikhāmaṇi . vandibṛndacintāmaṇi . kandukakandarppaṁ . jitavairidarppaṁ . saṁgrā
marāmaṁ . pagevarabhīmaṁ . ripubaḷakaṁjakuṁjaraṁ . saraṇāgatavajrapaṁja
raṁ . vairigharaṭṭaṁ . drōhamanneyadiśāpaṭṭaṁ . Ājjiranankakāṟaṁ . panni
rvvaragaṇḍa nāmādi samastapraśastisaṁpannaṁ śrīmanmādhavārarasar . kandaṁ .
śrīrāmāramaṇīyaṁ dvāravatīpuravarēśvaraṁ ṣāḍguṇyaṁ vīrāgragaṇya
nāhavadhīraṁ śrīmādhavāra nasatīdūraṁ . kavigamakavādivāgmige ravisu
tabaliśibidadhīciyiṁ migilene bēḍuvudaṁ kuḍutirddaṁ mādhavāranendu dhadipati
vṛtōrvvare pogaḷguṁ . vṛtta . bhavapādāṁbujabhṛṅganartthijanakaḷpōrvvījanuttuṅgakī
rttivitānaṁ ripubhūpasādhanapurapradhvaṁsakōpānaḷaṁ yuvatīkōmaḷahṛ
nmanōjasadṛśaṁ kānīnaniṁ tyāgi yādavaṁśāṁbarabhānu ṣaḍguṇayutaṁ
śrīmācibhūpāḷakaṁ . kandaṁ . dhuradeḍege kaliye pannirvvaragaṇḍaṁ toḍare
mellidane je bāppajjiranaṁkakāṟanennadebirudu vīramuma gī nālva
rttaname . Ene negaḻda mādhavārarasana divya śrīpadābjabhṛṅgaṁ guṇaratna
nidhānanenisidaṁ dāsana poredana nirbhbhṟutyateyiṁ
gaḷaṁ noṇevajjaraneṁba ma gedhurado ḷiṁndrāṁkuramenipa dāsaṁ
vāṇiya dorege vare sure bhūmaṇḍaladoḷ . dāsaṁ ripusami
tige yamapāsaṁ dhuradeḍege ni saṁ ṣṭaṁ gindranivāsaṁ ga
ṇikāviḷāsa nūrjjitasāsaṁ . harige vatiyaṁ dhuradoḷ vaṁśasaṁbha
vaṁgentaṇuvaṁ sthiradhairyyaraṁte pannirvaragaṇḍaṁ besase dāsa samarāṅgaṇadoḷ .
vacanaṁ . Ā dāsimayyaṁ śrīmādhavārarasara dayeyiṁ dagrahāraṁ ki
suguṇḍiya manneya sāmyamaṁ sarvvābhyantarasiddhiyindāḷuttamiḻdu . sakanṛ
pakāḷātīta saṁvatsara śataṅgaḷ 976 neya jaya saṁvatsarada bādubbeya
māvāsye sūryyagrahaṇadandu Ūroḍeya pramukha mahāja
namayvadiṁvaruma nerapi Ūra mēle karvvaṇi vṛddhiyal mūlasthāna ka
lidēvaśvāmige viṣṇudēvargge nandadīvigegaṁ . nivēdyakkaṁ . śrīkhaṇḍakkaṁ . dhūpakkaṁ
modalgoṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ padinaiydu . Ā vṛddhiyalu Eṇbar pravāsiga ru
ṇba satrakke koṭṭa modal gadyāṇa mirppattaydu satradaḍugeya sa
vidhege modalgoṭṭa gadyāṇa meraḍu . Intīdharmmama nūroḍeya
nu mūruṁ naḍeyisuvar . kiḍalīyade naḍeyisidavargge vāraṇā
siyoḷ sāsirakavileyaṁ sāsirvvarvvēdapāraga rggubhayamukhi goṭṭa
puṇyamakkuṁ . Ida naḷidavargge kurukṣētradoḷ sāsirvvarppārvvara naḷida
pātaka makkuṁ . sthānadal mahājana miruta mupēkṣegeydu naḍeyisadi
ḻdaḍe balibhaikṣātithyābhyāgatarddattānnaṅgaḷoḷage vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇare
ṇbaruṇḍa puṇyaṁ dāsimayyaṁ gakkuṁ . Idakke sākṣe . Āditya caṁdrāvaniḷō
naḷaśca dyaurbhbhūmirāpō hṛdayaṁ yamaśca . Ahaśca rātriśca (.) Ubhē ce sandhyē
dharmmasya jānīhi narasya vṛttaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ .
ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmma
sētu rnṛpāṇāṁ kāḷēkāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā
nbhūyōbhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . kandaṁ . puruṣanidhi dāsi mā
ḍida varadharmmaṁ caṁdra sūryya ruḷḷannavaraṁ parivarttisuvantāgire bare
daṁ cāmuṇḍarāya nīśāsanamaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
